name: team-mcp-atlassian
description: Connect Claude to Confluence and Jira via sooperset/mcp-atlassian running in a sandboxed Docker container with network egress filtering. Read-only by default.
long_description: This extension runs the mcp-atlassian MCP server inside a Docker container with network egress filtering (can ONLY connect to Atlassian domains), no filesystem mounts, and no host network access. An automatic filtering proxy prevents data exfiltration to arbitrary endpoints. Your API token is stored encrypted in your OS keychain. Read-only by default. Tool availability controlled via TOOLSETS. Delete operations blocked unless explicitly allowed.

atlassian_url.title: Atlassian Site URL
atlassian_url.description: Your Atlassian Cloud URL, e.g. https://your-company.atlassian.net (no trailing slash)

atlassian_email.title: Atlassian Email
atlassian_email.description: The email address you use to log into Atlassian (your Gmail)

toolsets.title: Enabled Toolsets
toolsets.description: Comma-separated toolset names. Use 'default' for core tools, 'all' for everything. Available: confluence_pages, confluence_comments, confluence_labels, confluence_users, confluence_analytics, confluence_attachments, jira_issues, jira_fields, jira_comments, jira_transitions, jira_projects, jira_agile, jira_links, jira_worklog, jira_attachments, jira_users, jira_watchers, jira_service_desk, jira_forms, jira_metrics, jira_development

read_only_mode.title: Read-Only Mode
read_only_mode.description: Set to 'false' to enable write operations (create, update). Default is read-only.

allow_delete_tools.title: Allow Delete Operations
allow_delete_tools.description: Set to 'true' to allow delete operations. Requires read_only_mode=false. Default blocks all deletes.

confluence_spaces_filter.title: Confluence Spaces Filter
confluence_spaces_filter.description: Comma-separated space keys to restrict access (e.g. 'DEV,TEAM,DOC'). Leave empty for all spaces.

jira_projects_filter.title: Jira Projects Filter
jira_projects_filter.description: Comma-separated project keys to restrict access (e.g. 'PROJ,DEV'). Leave empty for all projects.
